layers.name: Presentation Layer
layers.description: Converts data into a format that can be understood by the receiving device

layers.name: Session Layer
layers.description: Establishes, maintains, and terminates connections between applications

layers.name: Transport Layer
layers.description: Provides reliable data transfer between devices

layers.name: Network Layer
layers.description: Routes data between devices on different networks

layers.name: Data Link Layer
layers.description: Provides error-free transfer of data frames between devices on the same network

layers.name: Physical Layer
layers.description: Defines the physical means of transmitting data between devices
